[Learn how to support DDEV](https://ddev.com/support-ddev/#sponsor-development)

# Modules

Add functionality and customize your Drupal application with thousands of projects contributed by our amazing community.

[A module](https://www.drupal.org/docs/user_guide/en/understanding-modules.html) is code that extends Drupal's by altering existing functionality or adding new features. You can use modules contributed by others or create your own. Learn more about [creating](https://www.drupal.org/docs/creating-custom-modules) and [using Drupal modules](https://www.drupal.org/docs/extending-drupal/installing-modules).
